Rules.Name: Server uptime threshold
Rules.Description: Classifies server uptime as Healthy up to 37 days, Warning from 38 to 59 days, and Critical at 60 days or more.
Rules.RecommendationWarning: Verify Windows Update compliance and confirm whether a reboot is pending after the latest monthly cumulative update.
Rules.RecommendationCritical: Investigate patch compliance immediately. Verify latest cumulative updates, pending reboot state, and maintenance schedule.

Rules.Name: Disk free space threshold
Rules.Description: Classifies fixed disks using free percentage and free GB thresholds.
Rules.RecommendationCritical: Increase capacity or perform cleanup. Validate ConfigMgr logs, content library, WSUS/SUSDB, SQL files and IIS logs.

Rules.Name: Memory usage threshold
Rules.RecommendationWarning: Review running processes and workload trends.
Rules.RecommendationCritical: Review processes, ConfigMgr/SQL/WSUS workload, and consider increasing RAM.

Rules.Name: CPU usage threshold
Rules.RecommendationWarning: Review process activity and recurring maintenance windows.
Rules.RecommendationCritical: Review processes and role-specific workload immediately.

Rules.Name: Ping latency threshold
Rules.Description: Classifies ICMP latency and packet loss.
Rules.RecommendationWarning: Validate network path and remote site performance.
Rules.RecommendationCritical: Validate routing, WAN links, firewall inspection and server responsiveness.
